title: Windmannia parviflora
taxonomy: Windmannia parviflora is a species of flowering plant in the family Diapensiaceae. This plant is native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. It belongs to the genus Windmannia, which is a group of flowering plants that are characterized by their small, bell-shaped flowers. The Diapensiaceae family is a small group of flowering plants that are primarily found in the tropical regions of the Americas. Classification of Windmannia parviflora places it within the broader context of the angiosperm family, indicating its classification as an angiosperm.
